requirement: The integrated leaderboard sequence must not create duplicate or confusing section headings.
pass_condition: Only one "Ranking Sources To Use" heading appears before the LMArena subsection, or the leaderboard sequence is promoted to its own clear section.
fail_condition: The PDF shows two adjacent/repeated "Ranking Sources To Use" headings around the leaderboard sequence.
next_layout_action: Fix heading order before PDF render.

requirement: A-0014 methodology figure must appear before A-0013 historical rank chart.
pass_condition: The rendered page/spread shows A-0014 before A-0013 in reading order and tab/order flow.
fail_condition: A-0013 appears first, or the two figures are separated so the chart is read without the methodology figure.

requirement: The condensed glossary must appear before A-0014.
pass_condition: Glossary terms vote, config, split, category, rating, confidence interval, publication date, snapshot, and permission gate appear before the methodology figure.
fail_condition: Glossary appears after the figures, is omitted, or lacks config/split/category/date/snapshot/permission-gate terms.

requirement: A-0014 caption must be short enough for layout while preserving method vocabulary.
pass_condition: Full caption fits without overflow; if space is tight, LCAP-002 appears and nearby text preserves required terms.
fail_condition: Caption overflows, is truncated, or drops config/split/category/uncertainty/date/snapshot/permission-gate concepts entirely.
next_layout_action: Use LCAP-002 only with adjacent glossary.

requirement: A-0013 caption must state historical slice scope in the first sentence.
pass_condition: Caption includes `text_style_control`, `latest`, `overall`, top-twelve scope, published 2026-05-19, S-0080/SNAP-20260525-008, and uncertainty-overlap wording.
fail_condition: Caption says live/current/best models, omits date/config/split/category, or hides uncertainty in a distant note.
next_layout_action: Prefer LCAP-003; use LCAP-004 only in small layout.

requirement: The shared chart footnote must be visible near A-0013.
pass_condition: LCAP-005 appears directly below A-0013 or in the nearest same-page sidenote.
fail_condition: Footnote is pushed to an endnote/source list or appears after price/benchmark material.
next_layout_action: Reject layout if the footnote is not in the reader path.

requirement: Prohibited-use language must appear before any price, benchmark, or task-specific material.
pass_condition: Negative-control wording from LCAP-008 or an equivalent compact note appears after A-0013/footnote and before price-quality handoff.
fail_condition: Layout omits prohibited-use note or places it after price-quality, benchmark, coding, safety, latency, or enterprise claims.
next_layout_action: Keep compact; may fold into same-page footnote only if fully visible.

requirement: Any price section must start with a hard divider saying A-0013 is not a price-quality chart.
pass_condition: Before any prices appear, layout states that C-0046 remains active until same-scope price/rank joins are chart-ready.
fail_condition: Rank rows and provider prices share a spread without a divider, inviting reader-side price-quality inference.
next_layout_action: Reject price spread if divider is missing.

requirement: No visible text may convert the historical chart into live/current/best-model claims.
pass_condition: Search/render QA finds no "current leaderboard," "best models," "winner," "released frontier models," "best value," "best coding," "safest," or "fastest" language attached to A-0013/A-0014.
fail_condition: Any prohibited shortcut appears in caption, heading, pull quote, alt text, figure label, or nearby prose.
next_layout_action: Run `rg` and visual text check before PDF approval.

requirement: A-0013 and A-0014 must remain readable at final placement size.
pass_condition: Config/date/source labels, uncertainty indicators, row labels, and permission gates are legible at rendered size.
fail_condition: Figure is scaled so labels blur, overlap, or become too small to read.
next_layout_action: Render page/spread and inspect before merge.

requirement: Figure captions or nearby notes must expose source/provenance handles.
fail_condition: Source IDs, snapshot IDs, or chart-data paths disappear from caption/nearby note.
next_layout_action: Use abbreviated source line if caption space is tight.

requirement: Layout pass may not add any new rank, price, context-window, benchmark-superiority, release-status, or task-superiority claim without a source row and permission gate.
pass_condition: Every new claim maps to existing data/source/claim rows and preserves C-0046 blockers.
fail_condition: A new chart label, heading, callout, or caption introduces an unsupported rank/price/task inference.
next_layout_action: Create successor claim/source row before adding new layout text.
